title: ADX Trend Strength Pre-Filter Gate
summary: Add an ADX-based pre-filter that gates all long entry signals: only allow entries when ADX(14) ≥ 25 (trend confirmed) and suppress entries when ADX < 20 (trendless/choppy). Finviz's comprehensive backtest found ADX to be one of the most reliable standalone indicators, particularly for long positions, and the academic literature confirms technical indicators perform worse in low-sentiment, choppy markets. This adds a market microstructure quality check before any signal composite triggers a trade.
expected_impact: Finviz large-scale backtest (16,954 US stocks, 1995-2009) shows ADX(14) ≥ 40 is 'highly successful for long positions'; technical indicators perform significantly better in high-sentiment, high-ADX regimes than in choppy/low-ADX markets. Expected win rate improvement of +3-6% by filtering out entries in trendless conditions.
